mapper.sql: id, watch_id, snapshot_time, rank_indicator, change_rate, year_to_date_change_rate, leading_name, leading_symbol, leading_change_rate, constituent_count, rise_count, fall_count, flat_count, total_net_inflow, total_turnover_amount, total_volume, data_source, snapshot_bucket_time, trigger_type, fetched_at, expected_member_count, valid_member_count, delayed_member_count, unmapped_member_count, quality_status, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_sector_snapshot (watch_id, snapshot_time, rank_indicator, change_rate, year_to_date_change_rate, leading_name, leading_symbol, leading_change_rate, constituent_count, rise_count, fall_count, flat_count, total_net_inflow, total_turnover_amount, total_volume, data_source, snapshot_bucket_time, trigger_type, fetched_at, expected_member_count, valid_member_count, delayed_member_count, unmapped_member_count, quality_status) VALUES (#{watchId}, #{snapshotTime}, #{rankIndicator}, #{changeRate}, #{yearToDateChangeRate}, #{leadingName}, #{leadingSymbol}, #{leadingChangeRate}, #{constituentCount}, #{riseCount}, #{fallCount}, #{flatCount}, #{totalNetInflow}, #{totalTurnoverAmount}, #{totalVolume}, #{dataSource}, #{snapshotBucketTime}, #{triggerType}, #{fetchedAt}, #{expectedMemberCount}, #{validMemberCount}, #{delayedMemberCount}, #{unmappedMemberCount}, #{qualityStatus})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM market_sector_snapshot WHERE watch_id = #{watchId} ORDER BY snapshot_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM market_sector_snapshot WHERE watch_id = #{watchId} AND snapshot_bucket_time = #{bucketTime}
SELECT FROM market_sector_snapshot WHERE watch_id = #{watchId} ORDER BY snapshot_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_sector_snapshot WHERE watch_id = #{watchId}
